name: 67 Game

description: 67 Game is a rapid-fire puzzle game where you have just 67 seconds to beat all 67 levels. Every click brings a new surprise — fast reactions, weird logic, troll moments, and pure fun. You never know what kind of challenge comes next, so think fast and click smart. Can you beat them all in time? How do I play 67 Game? Use your mouse to click and solve the puzzles! Who created 67 Game? 67 Game is created by Stupidella.
